subject: English
chapter: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal
title: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The poem is written by William Wordsworth
It is a short Romantic poem about love and death
The poet initially believes the girl is untouched by time
Later he realizes that she has died
The poem suggests that humans become part of nature after death
characters: The Poet – Expresses feelings of realization about death
The Girl – A loved person who has died
literary_devices: Imagery – 'Rocks, stones and trees' describe nature
exam_tips: Remember the poem has two stanzas
Focus on the emotional shift from innocence to realization
